• New items introduced to enhance gameplay
• Various critical bug fixes and performance optimization

title: iKout
notes:
- Fixed an issue in the game score pad.
- Fixed an issue with in-app purchases.

title: RAID: Shadow Legends
notes:
New in 11.60.0:

FEATURES:
- You can now fight Cursed City & Grim Forest battles while running Background Multi-Battles.
- New rule for Siege Matchmaking & granted access to all Avatars for players in higher Tiers.
- Deputies can remove players' Teams & Traps in Siege.
- Clan Leaders & Deputies can view details on Scrolls used in Sieges.
- Quality-of-life changes to Saved Team Presets & added Presets for specific Dungeons & Siege.
- Improved Squad Reshuffle in Grim Forest.
- Champion rebalance.

title: DRAGON BALL LEGENDS
notes:
A major update for the 8th anniversary!
・Mission Plan overhaul!
All Mission Plans up to now have been combined, and a new Premium Plan is here! Complete Missions to get Chrono Crystals and various other rewards!
・Also adjusted various UI elements

title: Kiss of War - قبلة الحرب
notes:
1. Updated the World Boss feature.
2. Updated the Guild Boss feature.
3. Fixed several bugs.

title: Captain Tsubasa: Dream Team
notes:

title: Backgammon - Lord of the Board
notes: We've been working hard to make your experience smoother. Thanks for playing Lord of the Board!

title: Merge Cooking®
notes:
Welcome back, Chef!
A new version of Merge Cooking is available!
To provide a better experience, we're working hard to optimize the game performance as well as bring you exciting content.
We hope you can enjoy the time playing!
New to the game? Don't worry. We've prepared step-by-step instructions to guide you through. Join us and have some fun.
